title: Natural Capital and Ecosystem Assessment: privacy notice
body: "The Natural Capital and Ecosystem Assessment (NCEA) is an England-wide programme involving several Defra group organisations. Its purpose is to assess and describe the extent and condition of England’s biodiversity, ecosystems and natural capital assets.  This privacy notice sets out:   what personal data we process and how we use it where we store your personal data how long we keep your personal data for   "
